# tests

```go
import "github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/vm/embedded/tests"
```

Package tests holds the integration test suite for the embedded contracts.

### Overview

tests exercises each embedded contract end to end through a mock node from [github.com/zenon\\\-network/go\\\-zenon/zenon/mock](<https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/zenon/mock/>), composing scenarios from the helpers in [github.com/zenon\\\-network/go\\\-zenon/chain/genesis/mock](<https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/chain/genesis/mock/>). It is built and executed by \`go test\`; the package contains no production code.

Per\-package documentation is being filled in incrementally. See docs/STYLE.md for the full template applied in subsequent PRs.
